artifact_identity.prompt_identity: Add one-line docstring to main function in alpha.py
artifact_identity.task_identity: Add one-line docstring to main function in alpha.py

structural_decision_trace.why: the final result artifact is present and parseable
the modified-files section is present in the final result artifact
git_diff or structured diff_provenance evidence is present in the final result artifact
baseline, surface, prompt, and task identity fields are all present from the current run or final result artifact
cleanup status is present in the final result artifact

semantic_decision_trace.why: the modified-files list names at least one concrete changed file
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: record the actual changed files in the final result artifact, or mark the run as already_satisfied only when the requested state was already present before edits

semantic_decision_trace.why: the task reads like an add-only request and the proof stays additive without rewriting adjacent existing lines
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: keep the implementation inside the requested additive scope and remove unrelated adjacent rewrites or spacing tweaks

semantic_decision_trace.why: the task reads like a plain add-only request and the newly added surface stays visually plain without extra emphasis styling
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: keep the newly added surface visually plain and close to the requested text-only intent; remove extra emphasis styling unless the task asked for it

semantic_decision_trace.why: git_diff or structured diff_provenance proves a concrete patch for the named modified files
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: prove the patch on the changed files with a patch-shaped git_diff or a structured diff_provenance record, or use a truthful already_satisfied observation record when no edit was required

semantic_decision_trace.why: the proof includes explicit local verification evidence through structured provenance or a labeled scenario command and observed result
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: tie acceptance to explicit local verification evidence inside the current proof surfaces instead of prose-only readback and scenario text

semantic_decision_trace.why: readback evidence names the changed surface and records an observed property of it
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: record substantive readback from the changed sections on the attested surface

semantic_decision_trace.why: scenario-proof evidence records a concrete scenario context and outcome
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: record an explicit scenario-proof result for the attested target surface

semantic_decision_trace.why: baseline, surface, prompt, and task identity fields are all non-empty from the current run or final result artifact
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: restore baseline, execution surface, prompt, and task identity values for this run

semantic_decision_trace.why: cleanup status reports success with an explicit clean-surface summary
semantic_decision_trace.recommended_action: record a successful cleanup status for the execution surface
